title: AI Engineer – Python, AWS Bedrock, Generative AI, LangChain & Serverless Architect
company_focus:
Global digital consulting firm for financial services and
technology
description:
Job Summary Synechron is seeking a skilled AI Engineer
specializing in Python and AWS to design and implement end-
to-end Generative AI and Large Language Model (LLM) based
solutions. This role focuses on building intelligent
pipelines leveraging AWS Bedrock and advanced AI frameworks
to develop AI agents and serverless applications. The AI
Engineer will drive innovation by integrating LLMs with
enterprise systems and orchestrating AI workflows that
deliver business value, particularly in talent acquisition
and financial sectors.

Software Requirements

- Required:
  - Python programming with strong AI/ML development experience
  - AWS Bedrock (mandatory) for building AI solutions
  - AWS Lambda, API Gateway, and event-driven serverless
    architectures
  - Generative AI, LLMs, prompt engineering, and retrieval-
    augmented generation (RAG) pipelines
  - AI agent frameworks such as LangChain, Agent Core, or
    similar

- Preferred:
  - AI frameworks like PyTorch, TensorFlow
  - Experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP)
  - Research automation tools such as QuickSuite, Deep Research
  - Hierarchical and multi-agent architectures
  - Vector databases e.g., FAISS, Pinecone, Weaviate

Overall Responsibilities

- Design, develop, and implement scalable GenAI and LLM-based
  AI solutions on the AWS cloud platform
- Build intelligent data and AI pipelines using AWS Bedrock
  and advanced prompt engineering techniques
- Develop AI agents with multi-step reasoning and tool-calling
  capabilities leveraging agent-based frameworks
- Create serverless AI applications using AWS Lambda, API
  Gateway, and event-driven designs
- Integrate LLMs with enterprise APIs, vector databases, and
  RAG systems to enhance business workflows
- Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to align AI
  solutions with organizational objectives
- Stay abreast of emerging AI research and technologies to
  continuously improve and innovate AI models and
  applications
- Contribute to the strategic planning and delivery of AI
  initiatives within Synechron

Technical Skills (By Category)

- Programming Languages:
  - Essential: Python (advanced proficiency)

- Databases/Data Management:
  - Preferred: Vector databases including FAISS, Pinecone,
    Weaviate

- Cloud Technologies:
  - Essential: AWS Bedrock, AWS Lambda, API Gateway

- Development Tools and Methodologies:
  - Agile development practices, version control systems

- Security Protocols:
  - Awareness of secure cloud and AI practices preferred

Experience Requirements

- 4+ years in AI engineering, data science, or related roles
  involving generative AI and LLM-based solutions
- Hands-on experience building AI solutions on AWS, especially
  with AWS Bedrock and serverless architectures
- Proven expertise working with agentic AI systems, multi-step
  reasoning, or tool-calling pipelines
- Experience integrating LLMs and AI workflows within
  enterprise ecosystems
- Industry experience in talent acquisition, financial
  services, or related domains preferred
- Alternative experience pathways may include demonstrable
  project work in AI integration and cloud deployments

Day-to-Day Activities

- Designing and developing generative AI and agent-based
  pipelines on AWS
- Implementing serverless AI applications and managing event-
  driven workflows
- Collaborating with product, engineering, and data teams to
  understand requirements and deliver solutions
- Debugging and optimizing AI models and infrastructure
- Conducting research on emerging AI technologies and applying
  findings to enhance capabilities
- Participating in Agile rituals including sprint planning,
  reviews, and retrospectives

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science,
  Engineering, Data Science, or related fields, or
  equivalent practical experience
- Certifications related to AI, AWS cloud technologies, or
  software engineering are advantageous
- Commitment to ongoing learning in AI, cloud services, and
  emerging technologies

Professional Competencies

- Strong analytical and critical thinking skills focused on AI
  problem solving
- Effective communication to convey complex AI concepts to
  diverse stakeholders
- Collaborative mindset with leadership qualities to influence
  cross-functional teams
- Adaptability to fast-evolving AI landscapes and changing
  business priorities
- Innovative approach to AI solution design and implementation
- Strong organizational and time management skills for
  managing multiple priorities

SYNECHRON’S DIVERSITY & INCLUSION STATEMENT


Diversity & Inclusion are fundamental to our culture, and
Synechron is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and
is an affirmative action employer. Our Diversity, Equity,
and Inclusion (DEI) initiative ‘Same Difference’ is
committed to fostering an inclusive culture – promoting
equality, diversity and an environment that is respectful to
all. We strongly believe that a diverse workforce helps
build stronger, successful businesses as a global company.
We encourage applicants from across diverse backgrounds,
race, ethnicities, religion, age, marital status, gender,
sexual orientations, or disabilities to apply. We empower
our global workforce by offering flexible workplace
arrangements, mentoring, internal mobility, learning and
development programs, and more.

All employment decisions at Synechron are based on business
needs, job requirements and individual qualifications,
without regard to the applicant’s gender, gender identity,
sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, disabled or veteran
status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is directly focused on building, deploying, and
implementing Generative AI and LLM-based solutions,
including AI agents, RAG pipelines, and multi-step reasoning
systems. The engineer will work hands-on with AWS Bedrock,
LangChain, prompt engineering, and agentic AI frameworks to
create production AI applications.
